productDisplayName: Red Tape Men Black Casual Shoes
description: Take casual dressing to the next level with this pair of leather shoes from red tape. The full grain leather lends it a natural colour finish that adds to your look an immense style quotient.UpperFull-grain leather upper in natural colour for absolute comfort, durability and styleSuede overlays at the toe box, tongue and heel region for added shoe structure and styleFabric inner lining with a padded collar and tongue for ultimate breathable comfortLace-up system for a snug, customised FitWide mouth for ease of wearSuede haul loop for ease of wearMid-soleFabric foot-bed for sweat-free, cushioned comfortPU mid-sole for lightweight comfort and shock absorptionOut-soleDurable TPU out-sole with strategically placed multi-directional lugs for absolute grip and traction on various terrainsShoe careUse a branded leather conditioner and brush to maintain shoe shineDo not wash or store in direct sunlight
